title: Craft Overhaul
description: With this mod, you can restore and re-add missing or removed Minecraft crafting recipes.
body:
**Bring back the classics!**
This mod restores and re-adds crafting recipes that were removed or never officially included in Minecraft. Whether it's the enchanted golden apple, the old saddle recipe, or even armor made of chainmail, this mod lets you craft them once again. Perfect for nostalgic players or those who want more crafting options in survival mode.

 

**¡Recupera los clásicos!**
Este mod restaura y vuelve a agregar recetas de crafteo que fueron eliminadas o que nunca se incluyeron oficialmente en Minecraft. Desde la manzana dorada encantada hasta la receta antigua de la montura e incluso la armadura de malla, podrás crearlas nuevamente. Perfecto para jugadores nostálgicos o para quienes quieren más opciones de crafteo en modo supervivencia.

[![Imagen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4953413fc746ad893fc1c9369452d21cbd399e6b.png)](https://clankyhosting.com/cart.php?a=view&promocode=srnadien)
